news.headline: Platformr unveils CloudOps to speed up AWS migration and modernization, automating services for companies. Bend, Ore. Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: BEND, Oregon - On October 10, 2024, Platformr introduced its innovative CloudOps platform designed to revolutionize how businesses handle AWS cloud governance issues. This Software as a Service (SaaS) solution streamlines the process of adopting new technologies, migration, development, and deployment. The platform aims to simplify operations for companies by automating key tasks.

news.headline: Greenslant challenges big marketing players with results-driven approach, proving effectiveness over big budgets and teams.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Miami, Greenslant, an event marketing company, is showcasing that size doesn't always equate to success. Unlike larger agencies with extravagant budgets and extensive teams, Greenslant is challenging industry norms by focusing on personalized strategies...

news.headline: Canada Carbon issued 2,237,750 common shares to Alternative Resource Capital at $0.02 per share for advisory services.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, Canada Carbon Inc. announced the issuance of 2,237,750 common shares at a price of $0.02 per share to Alternative Resource Capital, a trading name of Shard Capital Partners LLP. This issuance is part of the engagement letter dated August 22, 2024, with the Consultant for corporate-finance advisory services. The Consultant received the shares as payment for a portion of the annual fee owed. Canada Carbon is listed on the TSX-V under the symbol CCB and on the FF as U7N1.

news.headline: Justin Sun chosen as Prime Minister of Liberland, founded in 2015 by Czech politician Vít Jedlička. Liberland is situated between Croatia and Serbia.
news.summary: Czech libertarian politician Vít Jedlička established Liberland on April 13, 2015, in a region situated between Croatia and Serbia.

news.headline: Southern Copper's Relative Strength Rating surpasses 80, indicating a significant improvement in stock performance.
news.summary: Southern Copper has recently achieved a Relative Strength Rating above 80. This indicates a notable performance trend in the stock. The news of Southern Copper's stock receiving an upgrade in its RS Rating was reported on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Apple stock downgraded by Jefferies to hold from buy, causing it to fall; needs time to 'ripen'.
news.summary: On Thursday, Apple's stock experienced a decline following a downgrade from buy to hold by brokerage firm Jefferies. The company's stock was affected by this change, as it needs time to mature according to the report from Investor's Business Daily. This adjustment came after an initially positive outlook, causing the stock to drop in value for the day. The downgrade impacted Apple's shares, leading to a shift in investor sentiment and influencing the stock market. This change highlights the importance of monitoring such updates as they can significantly influence stock performance and market trends.

news.headline: Article raises question if S&P 500 is close to topping; stock market debates future growth.
news.summary: Investors are currently discussing the next catalyst that could push stock market indexes even higher. There is speculation about whether topping signals are emerging. The S&P 500 is particularly under scrutiny, with questions being raised about whether it is close to reaching its peak. Market analysts are closely studying the charts to determine the potential trajectory of the index.

news.headline: 'Love Island USA' star, Kordell Beckham partners with 'Got Milk?' creators for "Real Matches Are Back" campaign at Mel's Drive-in, promoting in-person speed-dating events.
news.summary: One-on-one Introductions Regain Popularity Among Single Individuals through "Milkshakes and Morning Jammies" Speed-Dating Gatherings SAN CLEMENTE, California - On October 10, 2024, an increasing number of singles are opting for in-person connections over breakfast, embracing the cozy ambiance of the season. These unique speed-dating events, known as "Milkshakes and Morning Jammies," have become a trend in the area. Participants are rediscovering the joy of genuine interactions, indicating a shift towards valuing authentic connections. This approach has resonated with many, with attendance numbers reaching [insert number] in recent gatherings.

news.headline: Global flame retardant apparel market to grow by $1.18 billion from 2024-2028, driven by construction industry growth. - Technavio
news.summary: In a recent report assessing the influence of AI on market trends, the Global Flame Retardant Apparel Market is projected to experience a substantial growth of USD 1.18 billion between 2024 and 2028, states Technavio. The market is expected to exhibit a CAGR exceeding 5.5% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Robust pipeline for mCRPC with 90+ pharma companies involved in therapeutics segment, combating advanced prostate cancer.
news.summary: Metastatic Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer (mCRPC) is a type of prostate cancer that has spread to other parts of the body despite treatment to lower testosterone levels. Major pharmaceutical companies are currently conducting research and developing new treatments for this aggressive form of cancer that affects approximately 10-20% of prostate cancer patients. These treatments aim to improve outcomes and extend the survival rate of patients with mCRPC.

news.headline: CenterPoint Energy Foundation launches program donating 21 generators in 12 counties, part of $5M grant for community resiliency.
news.summary: A corporation is contributing 21 backup generators and additional aid in specified areas within 12 counties to enhance community resilience. This initiative is made possible through a $5 million grant from the CenterPoint Energy Foundation. The announcement was made in Houston at an inaugural event in Galveston on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: Meritage Hospitality Group reports growth in sales and operating margin for Q3 2024 across 9 months. Stock symbol: MHGU.
news.summary: In Grand Rapids, Michigan on October 10, 2024, Meritage Hospitality Group Inc. (OTCQX: MHGU), a leading franchise operator, announced its financial performance for the third quarter and nine months up to September 29, 2024.

news.headline: Duke Energy Florida will issue estimated restoration times for Hurricane Milton impact by tomorrow afternoon.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, Hurricane Milton struck less than a day ago. Duke Energy Florida has confirmed that estimated restoration times will be provided to all customers affected by the storm on Friday, October 11. This information comes in the wake of the hurricane causing disruptions.

news.headline: Steer Smarts releases Geometry Correction Brackets for JK, JL, and JT Jeep models. Improved driving experience.
news.summary: Leading innovator in the automotive industry, Steer Smarts, has unveiled the latest YETI XD™ model, featuring optimized geometry to elevate the driving experience across Jeep models. The release was announced in Plymouth, Michigan on October 10, 2024. Steer Smarts specializes in heavy-duty steering and chassis components, and the new model promises enhanced performance for drivers. This development signifies a significant advancement for the company, as it aims to cater to the growing demand for improved driving dynamics.

news.headline: American Lithium issues letter to shareholders on October 10, 2024, from Vancouver. Trading on TSX-V: LI, Nasdaq: AMLI, and Frankfurt: 5LA1.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 10, 2024, American Lithium Corp. (referred to as "American Lithium" or the "Company") released a letter to shareholders. The company is listed on TSX-V under the symbol LI, on Nasdaq under the symbol AMLI, and on Frankfurt as 5LA1.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price dropped 24% when this metric was last negative; will history repeat as prices dip below $59,000 today?
news.summary: The metrics for Bitcoin derivatives changed as the price of BTC dropped below $59,000 today. There are indications that lower prices could be on the horizon.

news.headline: New Zealand Manufacturing PMI Actual 46.9 (Forecast -, Previous 45.8)
BNZ: NZ manufacturing PMI increases to 46.9 in September
Automotive on-board power inverter market to grow by USD 162.2 million (at CAGR of 4.28%) from 2024-2028 due to rising PLC adoption in industries.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market dynamics. The Global Automotive On-Board Power Inverter Market is projected to increase by USD 162.2 million between 2024 and 2028, per Technavio. Expect a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 4.28% during this period.

news.headline: Procaps updates shareholders on investigation, financial restatement, governance enhancements for stability. CEO José Antonio Vieira provides critical updates on NASDAQ: PROC.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Procaps Group, S.A. (NASDAQ: PROC), headquartered in Miami and Barranquilla, Colombia, released a letter to shareholders from CEO José Antonio Vieira. The letter detailed important developments regarding the Company's independent investigation, financial restatement, governance improvements, and dedication to long-term stability. As a prominent LatAm healthcare and pharmaceutical services firm, Procaps affirmed its commitment to transparency and corporate governance, aiming to strengthen shareholder confidence.

news.headline: Stellus Private Credit BDC declares $0.48 Q4 2024 dividend, $0.16 each in Oct, Nov, Dec. Board of Trustees announced.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Stellus Private Credit BDC revealed that its Board of Trustees approved a monthly dividend of $0.1666 for October, November, and December, resulting in a total payout of $0.48 per share for the fourth quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Bio-Path Holdings closed $4.0 million private placement under Nasdaq rules, issuing 4,597,702 shares at $0.87/share.
news.summary: Bio-Path Holdings, Inc. completed a private placement offering for the issuance and sale of 4,597,702 shares of common stock (or equivalents), series A warrants for up to 6,407,657 shares, and short-term series B warrants for up to the same amount of shares, all at a price of $0.87 per share. The series A warrants and short-term series B warrants have an exercise price of $1.00 per share, with the former expiring five years from the stockholder approval date and the latter expiring twenty-four months from the same date. The biotechnology company specializes in developing targeted nucleic acid cancer drugs using its DNAbilize® liposomal delivery and antisense technology.

news.headline: QBE announces pricing of AUD subordinated notes offer
Cohen Circle Acquisition Corp. I prices IPO at $200,000,000 with 20,000,000 units at $10 each, listing on Nasdaq under "CCIRU".
news.summary: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania - Cohen Circle Acquisition Corp. I (NASDAQ: CCIRU) has disclosed the details of their initial public offering, pricing 20,000,000 units at $10.00 each. The company's units are set to trade on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol "CCIRU" starting from October 11, 2024. Each unit offered includes one Class A ordinary share and one-third of a redeemable warrant, with each whole warrant exercisable for one share at $11.50. Following the division of these units, the Class A ordinary shares and warrants are expected to be listed as "CCIR" and "CCIRW" on NASDAQ, while no fractional warrants will be available, only whole warrants will be tradable. The offering closing is targeted for around October 15, 2024, depending on meeting regular closing conditions.

news.headline: Niron Magnetics opens rare-earth-free magnet facility in Minneapolis, reducing reliance on rare earths.
news.summary: Niron Magnetics unveiled the inauguration of their commercial pilot plant in Minneapolis, marking a significant milestone as the sole global producer of high-performance rare-earth-free permanent magnets. The pioneering facility offers a sustainable substitute to rare earth magnets, vital components for various sectors like electric vehicles, wind power, and consumer electronics. Presently, these magnets account for 90% of the market share for potent permanent magnet applications.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates NAPA, MNTX, SMAR, EVBN on behalf of shareholders for securities law violations.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Halper Sadeh LLC, a firm specializing in investor rights, has initiated investigations into several companies suspected of violations of federal securities laws and possible breaches of fiduciary duties to shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is The Duckhorn Portfolio, Inc. (NYSE: [ticker symbol]).

news.headline: Global Titanium Dioxide market forecasted to grow by USD 7.72 billion from 2024-2028, with a CAGR of almost 5.98%.
news.summary: A recent report powered by AI concerning the Global Titanium Dioxide (Tio2) Market indicates significant growth prospects. The market size is poised to expand by USD 7.72 billion between 2024 and 2028. Analysts at Technavio project a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 5.98% for this period.

news.headline: NW Natural Holdings raises dividend to 49 cents per share, for annual rate of $1.96; 69th year in a row.
news.summary: The Board of Directors of Northwest Natural Holding Company (NYSE: NWN) has announced a boost in the quarterly dividend for its common stock to 49 cents per share. Shareholders of record on Oct. 31, 2024, will receive the dividend payment on Nov. 15, 2024. The indicated annual dividend rate of the Company now stands at $1.96 per share. NW Natural Holding Company (NYSE: NWN), based in Portland, Oregon, operates in the energy sector.

news.headline: Click Holdings Limited closed its IPO, selling 1,400,000 shares at $4 each, raising $5.6 million.
news.summary: Hong Kong's Click Holdings Limited, a human resources solutions provider, specializing in talent sourcing and personnel services for various industries, has successfully completed its initial public offering. The company sold 1,400,000 Ordinary Shares at $4.00 per share to the public, resulting in total gross proceeds of $5.6 million, excluding underwriting discounts and offering expenses. The clients of CLIK range from accounting and professional firms, Hong Kong listed companies, nursing homes, individual patients, logistics companies, to warehouses.

news.headline: AVITA Medical to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7 after U.S. markets close.
news.summary: AVITA Medical is set to unveil its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 7, 2024, following the closure of the U.S. financial markets.

news.headline: Global Hydrogen Sulfide (H2S) Scavenger Market to increase by USD 255.7 million (3.27% CAGR) from 2024-2028 due to oil & gas growth.
news.summary: In a recent report on the impact of artificial intelligence on market trends, it was revealed that the Global Hydrogen Sulfide (H2S) Scavenger Market is projected to expand significantly by approximately USD 255.7 million between 2024 and 2028. This growth is expected to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of around 3.27%, showcasing the changing landscape influenced by AI technologies.

news.headline: Pieridae sets conference call to review Q3 2024 performance. Join webcast for details. #earnings #conference #Q3
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the rate of inflation in the country has surged to 5.4%, the highest increase in the past decade. The sudden jump in prices of essential goods and services has significantly impacted the cost of living for the population. Economists attribute this sharp rise to various factors such as supply chain disruptions, increased fuel prices, and growing demand post-pandemic. This inflation surge has raised concerns among policymakers and experts as it may lead to a decrease in consumer spending and overall economic stability. Efforts are being made to monitor and control the inflation rate to prevent further financial implications on the country's economy.

news.headline: Perspective Therapeutics to present data on [212Pb]VMT01 study at SMR Congress, held on Oct 10-13, 2024 in New Orleans.
news.summary: Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. revealed today in Seattle that their Phase 1/2a study of [212Pb]VMT01 has been chosen for presentation at the 21st International Congress of the Society for Melanoma Research in New Orleans, Louisiana from October 10-13, 2024. The company, traded on NYSE AMERICAN as CATX, focuses on innovative cancer treatment solutions and is known for developing radiopharmaceutical treatments. This announcement marks a significant milestone for the Company as they showcase their groundbreaking research at the prestigious conference.

news.headline: Supernus Pharmaceuticals to discuss SPN-820 study for major depression in webcast on Oct 17 at 4:30pm ET. #SUPN #Phase2a
news.summary: In Rockville, Maryland, on October 10, 2024, Supernus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: SUPN), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in CNS disease treatments, disclosed plans for a webcast and conference call scheduled for Thursday, October 17, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The event aims to discuss findings from the open-label Phase 2a trial of SPN-820 utilized in major depressive disorder treatment.

news.headline: Nexus Industrial REIT sells 50% ownership in Old Montreal office portfolio and vacant land. (Tweet-length)
news.summary: Nexus Industrial REIT, also known as Nexus or the REIT, recently revealed the sale of its 50% ownership stake in the Old Montreal office portfolio. This includes an office building and a mixed-use building situated in Montreal. The Properties were part of the REIT's assets.

news.headline: Indiana's September home sales surpass 2023, benefited by lower mortgage rates and increased inventory.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on October 10, 2024, data from the Indiana Association of REALTORS® revealed that September saw a positive trend in the housing market. Closed and pending home sales exceeded those of 2023, attributed to lower mortgage rates, decreased price growth, and increased inventory, attracting more buyers. The latest figures indicate a promising shift in the market dynamics with a notable increase in home sales.

news.headline: Influencers should avoid normalizing natural disasters; a recent report reveals an increase in reported incidences by 20%.
Carlisle Companies (NYSE: CSL) will release Q3 2024 results on Oct 24, 2024, with a conference call scheduled at 5pm ET.
news.summary: Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE:CSL) is set to announce its third quarter 2024 financial results on October 24, 2024, after the market closes. A conference call to address these results will take place at 5pm ET on the same day. Interested parties can join the call via webcast at www.carlisle.com/investors/events-and-presentations or by dialing in at the following numbers: Domestic toll-free - 800-549-8228 and International - 646-564-2877.

news.headline: IMF and Jordan agree on efficiency review, unlocking around $131m
Pye-Barker Fire & Safety acquires DACSIS, bolstering fire and security protection services. Largest provider in US.
news.summary: In Atlanta on October 10, 2024, Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, the leading provider of comprehensive fire protection, life safety, and security services in the US, announced the acquisition of DACSIS, a company specializing in fire suppression and fire alarm systems integration located in Scott. This marks a significant milestone for Pye-Barker Fire & Safety as it expands its portfolio with the addition of DACSIS and strengthens its position in the market. The acquisition demonstrates the company's commitment to growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Citadel Credit Union settles with DOJ, launching 'Home Help Program' to support homebuyers, enhancing commitment to brighter future.
news.summary: Citadel Credit Union, located in EXTON, Pa., has recently reached a settlement with the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) on October 10, 2024. As part of the agreement, the credit union is making commitments that include the launch of Citadel's 'Home Help Program' to assist homebuyers. This development signifies a significant move for the institution as it aims to support individuals in the housing market.

news.headline: Natus requests FDA 510(k) clearance for new point-of-care EEG solution.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Middleton-based company Natus Medical Incorporated revealed that it has filed a FDA 510(k) premarket notification to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for their Natus point-of-care EEG device. This submission marks a significant step in the approval process for the device. Clinicians who assessed the system spoke highly of its performance and features.

news.headline: Clover Health PPO Medicare Advantage Plans receive 4-star rating for 2025, driven by outstanding healthcare quality, medication adherence, and member experience.
news.summary: There was a notable increase in the overall star rating performance, primarily attributed to outstanding performance in healthcare quality measures, medication adherence, and member experience. This surge was highlighted by a significant improvement in these key areas, showcasing a commendable effort to excel in providing quality healthcare services and enhancing member satisfaction. The remarkable progress in these aspects contributed to an impressive overall star rating performance.

news.headline: Aptar authorizes $500 million share buyback and declares dividend in Crystal Lake, Illinois.
news.summary: Aptar, headquartered in Crystal Lake, Illinois, has recently announced a new share repurchase program worth $500 million. This initiative allows the company to buy back its own stock within the specified budget. In addition to this, Aptar has also declared a quarterly dividend for its shareholders. This decision reflects the company's commitment to providing value to its investors.

news.headline: Nike has appointed Tom Peddie as VP, GM of North America, replacing Scott Uzzell. Peddie will drive strategic growth.
news.summary: In Beaverton, Oregon, NIKE, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) has revealed that Tom Peddie will take over as Vice President and General Manager of the North America Geography. He will be succeeding Scott Uzzell, who has chosen to depart from the company. Peddie's return to North America is seen as a positive move, with his extensive expertise making him the ideal candidate to spearhead the region's strategic growth in the realm of sports. His excellent rapport with retailers and his adeptness in creating a cohesive marketplace will be valuable assets moving forward.

news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. acquires 1,483,000 common shares of Avicanna Inc., increasing ownership to over 2%.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Canadian venture capital firm ThreeD Capital Inc. made a public announcement regarding their recent acquisitions. Through transactions occurring from October 1 to October 7, 2024, ThreeD obtained ownership of 1,483,000 common shares of a company, constituting around 1.4% of all outstanding common shares. This move increased the combined ownership of ThreeD and Sheldon Inwentash, referred to as the "Joint Actor," to over 2% on a partially diluted basis. The acquisitions were focused on companies in the junior resources and disruptive technologies sectors.

news.headline: Allegion to announce 2024 third-quarter results on Oct. 24; conference call at 8 a.m. ET with analysts and investors.
news.summary: Dublin-based Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE) will announce its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Thursday, October 24th before the market opens. The conference call for analysts and investors, hosted by President and CEO John H. Stone and CFO Mike Wagnes, will commence at 8 a.m. ET on the same day. The call aims to discuss the company's performance. A live webcast of the conference will also be available for real-time listening.

news.headline: Genpact's AI Day attracts partners and clients for industry innovation, held in New York on Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In the bustling city of New York on October 10, 2024, Genpact (NYSE: G) held an exclusive event known as AI Day. The event served as a platform for partners and clients from various industries to come together, aiming to shape the future through the delivery of professional services and solutions by the global firm. The gathering saw an impressive number of attendees reflecting the widespread interest in advancing technologies and innovative strategies.
